faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Quick guide to using our platform
faq.a1: After registration and login, browse products, select your desired account, add to cart, and complete payment. Account details will be automatically sent to your order page after successful payment.
faq.a2: Currently we support USDT (TRC20) cryptocurrency payment. USDT is a stablecoin on TRON blockchain with automatic confirmation, safe and fast. Other payment methods (PayPal, Stripe) are coming soon.
faq.q3: Is there a warranty for purchased accounts?
faq.a3: All accounts come with 24-hour first login warranty. If you encounter any issues during first login (wrong password, banned account, etc.), contact customer service immediately for free replacement or full refund.
faq.a4: Click 'Become a Seller' button at the top of the page, fill in shop information and contact details. Our review team will process your application within 1-3 business days. Once approved, you can start listing products.
faq.q5: How long does account delivery take?
faq.a5: We use an automatic delivery system. Account information will be displayed on your order details page immediately after payment, usually within 1 minute.
faq.a6: You can contact us via Telegram bot, Telegram channel, or email. Customer service is available 7x24 hours, and we will respond to your inquiries as soon as possible.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Content: TopiVra is a social account trading platform that provides trading services for buyers and sellers. By using this platform, you agree to comply with the following terms.
terms.section2Content: Users must ensure that all information provided is true and accurate. It is prohibited to use this platform for any illegal activities, including but not limited to fraud, money laundering, etc.
terms.section3Content: All transactions are conducted through platform escrow. After the buyer makes payment, the funds will be held by the platform and released to the seller after confirmation of receipt. After the transaction is completed, the buyer has 24 hours to verify the account.
terms.section4Content: Sellers must ensure that the accounts sold are genuine and valid, and provide account information according to the product description. If there are problems with the account, the seller shall bear corresponding responsibilities.
terms.section5Content: Buyers must complete verification within 24 hours after receiving the account. Failure to raise objections after the deadline will be deemed as transaction completion.
terms.section6Content: In case of disputes, both parties can negotiate through platform customer service. The platform has the right to determine the dispute result based on evidence.
terms.section7Content: The platform strictly protects user privacy and will not disclose user information to third parties unless required by law.
terms.section8Content: The platform reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Modified terms will be published on the website, and continued use of the platform indicates acceptance of the modified terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Content: We collect personal information you provide when using this platform, including but not limited to: username, email address, contact information, transaction records, etc. This information is used to provide and improve our services.
privacy.section2Content: Your personal information is only used for: processing orders, providing customer support, sending important notifications, improving platform features. We will not use your information for other purposes.
privacy.section3Content: We adopt industry-standard security measures to protect your information, including data encryption, access control, security audits, etc. Unauthorized third parties cannot access your personal information.
privacy.section4Content: We will not sell or rent your personal information to third parties. Sharing may only occur in the following situations: with your consent, legal requirements, protection of platform rights.
privacy.section5Content: This platform uses cookies to improve user experience and analyze website traffic. You can choose to disable cookies in your browser settings.
privacy.section6Content: We will retain your personal information for the necessary period. After account cancellation, we will delete your personal information within a reasonable period.
privacy.section7Content: You have the right to access, correct, and delete your personal information. If you have any needs, please contact our customer service team.
privacy.section8Content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Significant changes will be notified to you through website announcements.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.section1Content: Buyers can apply for a refund in the following situations: unable to log in to the account, account information seriously inconsistent with description, account has security risks. Refund requests must be submitted within 24 hours after receipt.
refund.section2Content:
1. Buyer submits refund request on order details page with reason.
2. Seller responds to refund request within 48 hours.
3. If both parties cannot reach an agreement, platform intervention can be requested.
4. After platform approval, refund will be returned to original payment account within 1-3 business days.
refund.section3Content:
Refunds are not supported in the following situations:
- Exceeding 24-hour verification period
- Account banned due to buyer's improper operation
- Buyer has modified account password or binding information
- False refund request
refund.section4Content: The refund amount is the actual payment amount by the buyer. If coupons are used, coupons will not be refunded. Refunds do not include handling fees.
refund.section5Content: If there is a dispute between buyer and seller regarding refund, the platform will make a determination based on evidence provided by both parties. Platform determination is final.
refund.section6Content: For refund-related questions, please contact customer service: support@topivra.com or via Telegram customer service.
